name: Pickett, J. M.
motto: "I love nobody if nobody loves me."
clubs: Captain Base Ball, Basket Ball, Foot Ball, '13
President Eagle Athletic Club, Athletic Association, '13 and '14
description: "As wise as an owl, Is our President, 'Tall.' He will make a good pal For most any old gal."
text:
"I love nobody if nobody loves me."
"As wise as an owl, Is our President, 'Tall.' He will make a good pal For most any old gal."

name: Hollis, Gertrude
motto: "She smiles and the world smiles with her."
clubs: Editor Domestic Arts and Science on MONITOR Staff
description: "Many the days of life she's past, She dwells on the Senior brink at last. Her suitors were strong but few, Don't try her, she'll turn cold on you."
text:
"She smiles and the world smiles with her."
"Many the days of life she's past, She dwells on the Senior brink at last. Her suitors were strong but few, Don't try her, she'll turn cold on you."

name: Gandy, Alvin
motto: "The goose, who is her mate? The gander."
description: "Senior Alvin Gandy, He surely is a dandy, That's a big joke, For he never drinks, chews or smokes."
text:
"The goose, who is her mate? The gander."
"Senior Alvin Gandy, He surely is a dandy, That's a big joke, For he never drinks, chews or smokes."

name: Irvin, Heath
motto: "The very hairs of his head are numbered."
clubs: Vice President, Y. M. C. A., '14
description: "The boy that uses the powder Is the one that speaks the louder. At primping Irvin is no bluff, For he sure does put on the stuff."
text:
"The very hairs of his head are numbered."
"The boy that uses the powder Is the one that speaks the louder. At primping Irvin is no bluff, For he sure does put on the stuff."

name: Ruby, Mendenhall
motto: "While I live I will never flee from a man."
description: "Amid the stars of life she shines, And with the boys she has a time. Among the flirts she rules as queen, A clever one never was seen."
text:
"While I live I will never flee from a man."
"Amid the stars of life she shines, And with the boys she has a time. Among the flirts she rules as queen, A clever one never was seen."

name: Hilton, Robinson
description: "Hilton always turned out the light, To raise a fuss and fight; But when called to taw He always hollered MA." Sixteen
text:
"Windy as the March breezes."
"Hilton always turned out the light, To raise a fuss and fight; But when called to taw He always hollered MA." Sixteen

name: Stonecipher, Myrtle
motto: "Her thoughts she spoke in musical tones."
description: "She strived for a subject in dentistry, Although she studied her chemistry. Her face said she was sixteen, But she hopes to marry in nineteen fifteen."
text:
"Her thoughts she spoke in musical tones."
"She strived for a subject in dentistry, Although she studied her chemistry. Her face said she was sixteen, But she hopes to marry in nineteen fifteen."

name: Jackson, Mark
motto: "I am the arisen Napoleon; I conquer self."
description: "Mark went up to Buena Vista To see his girl, but he missed her; For she sent him a twister When he tried to steal up and kiss her."
text:
"I am the arisen Napoleon; I conquer self."
"Mark went up to Buena Vista To see his girl, but he missed her; For she sent him a twister When he tried to steal up and kiss her."

name: Pearce, Frances
motto: "She is not to be deceived by anyone."
description: Frances: Life was weary and sad. She often pined for a look from a lad. Her girlhood life was spent in the shade, And she will live to be a very old maid. Seventeen.
text:
"She is not to be deceived by anyone."
Frances: Life was weary and sad. She often pined for a look from a lad. Her girlhood life was spent in the shade, And she will live to be a very old maid. Seventeen.

name: Murphy, Sula
motto: "Gentle of speech and brilliant of mind."
description: A man who is worthy of the prim Sula Murphy, for his meals need not worry, she'll prepare them in a hurry.
text:
"Gentle of speech and brilliant of mind."
A man who is worthy of the prim Sula Murphy, for his meals need not worry, she'll prepare them in a hurry.

name: Owens, Roy
motto: "I'm never less alone than when by myself."
description: Jack of all trades and good at none, but at garden growing none beats Roy Owens.
text:
"I'm never less alone than when by myself."
Jack of all trades and good at none, but at garden growing none beats Roy Owens.

name: Pearce, Mary
motto: "And it is true that they who talk the most have the least to say."
description: Mary, who admires a drummer, her principal vocation in summer is to plan in her arts a house with its parts. Eighteen.
text:
"And it is true that they who talk the most have the least to say."
Mary, who admires a drummer, her principal vocation in summer is to plan in her arts a house with its parts. Eighteen.

name: Irene, Mcdaniel
motto: "In planning a future home she has no equal."
description: Modest and serene is Irene, Very queer it may seem, But in her choice of an animal She invariably chooses a Campbell.
text:
"In planning a future home she has no equal."
Modest and serene is Irene, Very queer it may seem, But in her choice of an animal She invariably chooses a Campbell.

name: Eugene, Thomas
motto: "As the mouse is quiet, he is quiet."
description: He who is always on the alert Is in most cases a flirt. Eugene is never very alert, Therefore he is no flirt.
text:
"As the mouse is quiet, he is quiet."
He who is always on the alert Is in most cases a flirt. Eugene is never very alert, Therefore he is no flirt.

name: Ethel, Hales
motto: "When I'm leader of a suffragette band."
description: Miss Ethel Hales, Old but wise; To be a suffragette She always aspires. Nineteen.
text:
"When I'm leader of a suffragette band."
Miss Ethel Hales, Old but wise; To be a suffragette She always aspires. Nineteen.
